title: You know how people are comparing Rebuild 20
display_title: You know how people are comparing Rebuild 20
wikitext:
[]: You know how people are comparing Rebuild 2.0... [SPOILERS]             Quote Post by quixote77 » Thu Jul 16, 2009 5:32 pm ...To Gurren Lagann... Someone actually went out and did this a few days after the film showed: [url]http://www.fanfiction.net/s/5184649/1/Neon_Toppa_EVA_Lagann[/url] Pretty well written, am interested where it goes. Only two chapters so far, but the first has a lot of good action and the second one has a great deal of man-I mean-fanservice in it. It's also got a soundtrack listing, so if you have music from either series, you should consider that a bonus of sorts. Author says he'll post chapters faster if he gets more reviews, so if you liked it, I guess you could write him one if you enjoyed it, might make him work faster.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Jul 16, 2009 5:50 pm I thought the comparison was "...to a fanfic...", but that's equally applicable here.

[]:             Quote Post by bladerj » Thu Jul 16, 2009 5:53 pm isnt there a Asuka crossover statue ?

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Thu Jul 16, 2009 6:06 pm Asuka and Yoko, I like where this is going.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Thu Jul 16, 2009 7:06 pm Frankly, I think the Shinji and Warhammer 40K fanfic was a lot cooler.

[]:             Quote Post by I Accidentally Dracula » Thu Jul 16, 2009 7:53 pm I prefer the fanfic where Shinji says something like "**** you. I will not be your pawn" to Gendou at the very beginning, and Evas are used to enter this detached alternate universe where the all-girl pilot team ummm embraces human-sized versions of each Angel to defeat them. ... but I'm the kind of person who basically just needs porn to call something the best thing ever, so don't mind me.

[]:             Quote Post by quixote77 » Thu Jul 16, 2009 8:51 pm Well, it ain't done yet, so, best to keep an eye on this, eh?
